name: YOLO!
overview: Dita is sentenced to death in the near future. For the rest of her life, she did the crazy things she was afraid of, including getting close to boys. Not just one guy, but three at a time!

trailers.title: Trailer Resmi | YOLO! | Adhisty Zara, Jerome Kurnia, Daffa Wardhana, Michael Olindo
